query: Is my EKS cluster ready to upgrade from 1.31 to 1.32? Run a readiness assessment and give me a score.
Score my upgrade readiness for EKS — I need to know what's blocking us before we touch the control plane.
Run an upgrade readiness check on cluster `payment-prod`. We're considering moving to 1.32 next sprint and want a go/no-go report.
Generate a pre-upgrade EKS assessment report — flag any deprecated APIs, add-on incompatibility, Karpenter issues, and subnet IP problems.
We're on EKS 1.30 and Karpenter 0.37. Is this combination going to block us if we try upgrading the control plane to 1.31?
Audit our cluster for upgrade blockers — single-replica deployments, drain-blocking PDBs, AL2 nodes, anything that would stall a node-group rolling update.
I want a readiness score (0-100) for upgrading staging-cluster to the next minor version. Include remediation steps for anything that fails.
Produce an HTML upgrade-assessment report I can share with the platform team — cover the 8 standard areas (version, breaking changes, deprecated APIs, add-ons, nodes, workloads, AWS Insights, plan).
Can I upgrade my cluster to 1.32? Need to know before I plan a maintenance window.
Are we good to go to 1.33 next sprint, or is something going to blow up?
Walk me through actually upgrading my EKS cluster from 1.30 to 1.31 — give me the full step-by-step procedure including control-plane and node-group commands.
My EKS upgrade is stuck mid-flight at the data-plane phase — nodes won't drain. How do I debug this and is it safe to roll back?
Give me the blue-green migration procedure for moving workloads from EKS 1.27 to a fresh 1.31 cluster, including DNS cutover steps.
What version of EKS am I running and which add-ons do we have installed? Just inherited the cluster and need a discovery pass.
Do a full reconnaissance on our EKS environment — compute strategy, IaC tooling, CI/CD, observability stack — so we know what we're working with.
Should we use Karpenter or Managed Node Groups for our new EKS cluster? Need an architectural recommendation, not an upgrade plan.
How do I install and configure the EKS MCP server so my AI assistant can actually query the cluster?
What's the upgrade procedure for self-managed vanilla Kubernetes on bare metal from 1.28 to 1.30?
